name: Prospector Metals Corp.
description: Prospector Metals Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on the discovery of high-grade gold and base metal deposits in mining-friendly jurisdictions. The company maintains a diversified portfolio of projects across Canada, including the Savant Lake Gold Project in Ontario and the ML Project in Yukon. Led by an experienced management team with a track record of discovery, Prospector Metals utilizes modern exploration techniques and geological modeling to identify and advance high-potential targets, aiming to create significant shareholder value through strategic exploration and project development.
